Challenges Log In

iDEX Challenges

iDEX Challenges

DEFENCE INDIA STARTUP
CHALLENGES

Taking the iDEX initiative further, Defence India Startup Challenge "has been launched by Ministry of Defence in partnership with Atal Innovation Mission, aimed at supporting Startups/MSMEs/Innovators to create prototypes and/or commercialize products/solutions in the area of National Defence and Security.

OUR VISION
  • Help to create functional prototypes of products/technologies relevant for national security (prototyping), and spur fast-moving innovation in the India Defence sector
  • Help new tech products/technologies to find a market and early customer (commercialization) in the form of the Indian Defence Establishment.

IDEX

CHALLENGE CATEGORIES
